## Trap Flag

There is a Trap Flag in the Flags register. Bit number 8 of the EFLAGS register is the trap flag. When the Trap Flag is set, a SINGLE\_STEP exception is generated.

* * *

##### Technique Identifier

[U0131](https://unprotect.it/search/?keyword=U0131)

##### Technique Tag

[trapflag](https://unprotect.it/search/?keyword=trapflag)

 included on this list, please do not hesitate to contact us. We will be happy to update the list and
